name: write_file
description: Create or fully overwrite a file in the workspace. For modifying parts of existing files, prefer `apply_diff`. Requires human approval. The diff between old and new content is shown to the user before writing.

path.description: Workspace-relative path. Parent directories are created if missing.

content.description: Full new content of the file.

reason.description: One-sentence rationale shown to the user in the approval card.

created.description: True if the file did not exist before.
